caption: A man with long dark hair and glasses performs on a stage in front of a backdrop of brown horizontal blinds. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt and a dark vest featuring ornate blue floral embroidery and red accents on the front. He stands behind a microphone on a stand, singing while holding a light-colored acoustic guitar. Several people are seen from the back in the foreground, their heads partially obscuring the lower portion of the scene. To the right of the performer, the word "ORCA" appears in white uppercase letters on a dark background. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, singing into the microphone with slight variations in his facial expression and head tilt as he performs. The camera remains stationary, capturing the scene in a medium shot.
